description: The episode opens with a heated confrontation at a gas station, where Hannah Hutchins is blamed for a tragic particle accelerator explosion that killed several people. Tension escalates as objects begin to move seemingly of their own accord, culminating in an explosive accident that leaves Hannah terrified.

transcript.line: Jack Benson was a friend of mine.
You were the one in charge, right? Some kind of manager?
Uh, he... he was my friend, too.
Jack's wife said it was your fault. That true?
You know what? Um, never mind. I think I'm just gonna go somewhere else.
Hey! I asked you a question.
Oh, man! What the hell? You did that?
